feed.title: US.gov
feed.subtitle: Combined U.S. federal government feed: NSA, Department of War (Featured Stories, News, Advisories, News Releases), FBI, NOAA, the USAGov and GSA blogs, GSA news releases, and U.S. Army news.

entry.title: Department of War Launches Interactive Investment Intelligence Center Tracking Transformative Industrial Base Revitalization
entry.content: The War Department's Office of the Assistant Secretary of War for Industrial Base Policy announced the launch of an Investment Intelligence Center interactive public website.

entry.title: 25th Infantry Division Synchronizes Split-Operations Across Pacific for Lightning Surge 4
entry.content: 25th Infantry Division Synchronizes Split-Operations Across Pacific for Lightning Surge 4

entry.title: Forging a Bilateral Lifesaving Force: MEDDAC-J NCO Honored by JGSDF Medical Service School
entry.content: Forging a Bilateral Lifesaving Force: MEDDAC-J NCO Honored by JGSDF Medical Service School

entry.title: 75th USARIC fleet assessment team establishes equipment benchmarks that measure performance during OSJ 26
entry.content: 75th USARIC fleet assessment team establishes equipment benchmarks that measure performance during OSJ 26

entry.title: Army Reserve railway Soldiers keep logistics on track during Operation Sentinel Justice
entry.content: Army Reserve railway Soldiers keep logistics on track during Operation Sentinel Justice

entry.title: 30th Rimpac Kicks Off in Hawaii
entry.content: Rim of the Pacific, the world's premier international maritime exercise, marks its 30th iteration this year.

entry.title: Army Reserve chaplains target battle-focused training
entry.content: Army Reserve chaplains target battle-focused training

entry.title: The 737th Transportation Company takes a training mission operational at Operation Sentine
entry.content: The 737th Transportation Company takes a training mission operational at Operation Sentine

entry.title: U.S. Space Command Highlight
entry.content: U.S. Space Command Highlight

entry.title: Air Force Rescue Squadron Deploys Jolly Green II Helicopters to East Africa
entry.content: The 56th Expeditionary Rescue Squadron arrived at Camp Lemonnier, Djibouti, setting a milestone by deploying HH-60W Jolly Green II helicopters and establishing a critical rotary-wing rescue capability in East Africa to support regional response efforts.

entry.title: New eDNA tool to help track recovery of sunflower sea star, a Pacific Coast ‘apex predator’
entry.content: New eDNA tool to help track recovery of sunflower sea star, a Pacific Coast ‘apex predator’ Michael Peñuelas, a Seattle scuba diver, examines a large sunflower sea star in the Edmonds Marine Park in Puget Sound, Washington, in 2021. (Image credit: Courtesy of Zachary Gold) June 25, 2026 A wasting disease that surged during the intense 2013-2016 Pacific marine heatwave known as the Blob decimated numerous species of sea stars and triggered the collapse of vast coastal kelp forests from the Aleuti

entry.title: Army Armaments Center Develops New Counter-UAS Capability
entry.content: A new effort led by the U.S. Army Combat Capabilities Development Command Armaments Center demonstrated advancements developed for fire control, enabling the ability to engage and defeat drones with a common remotely operated weapon station while shooting on the move.

entry.title: ROU Capitan Miranda arrives for Sail250 Maryland & Airshow Baltimore
entry.content: ROU Capitan Miranda arrives for Sail250 Maryland & Airshow Baltimore

entry.title: The Office of the Under Secretary of War for Research and Engineering Finalizes Lab Review, Aims to Modernize R&D Enterprise
entry.content: The Office of the Undersecretary of War for Research and Engineering finalized a set of recommendations to modernize and reform the War Department's vast research enterprise, priming it to ease bureaucratic friction points and to rapidly deliver combat-ready technologies.

entry.title: JBM-HH Kicks Off "101 Days of Summer" with Safety Day
entry.content: JBM-HH Kicks Off "101 Days of Summer" with Safety Day

entry.title: Securing Global Dominance: DoW Unleashes Quantum Defense Strategy to Harden Networks and Empower the Joint Force
entry.content: The War Department Chief Information Officer, Honorable Kirsten Davies, announced the release of the Post Quantum Cryptography Strategy.

entry.title: National Guard Counterdrug Program Adapts to Evolving Criminal Threats
entry.content: The National Guard Counterdrug Program helps law enforcement connect investigations and share intelligence to stop sophisticated drug trafficking networks across the country.

entry.title: Behind the Medals: Team Army Coaches and Mentors Help Soldiers Rediscover What's Possible
entry.content: Behind the Medals: Team Army Coaches and Mentors Help Soldiers Rediscover What's Possible

entry.title: Department of War Announces Initiative to Revolutionize ISR via Quantum Sensing
entry.content: The Department of War's Defense Innovation Unit announced the launch of a multiphase initiative designed to transition mature quantum sensing and timing technologies directly to the joint force.

entry.title: A Historic First: Marine Corps Reserve Integrates Multidomain Assets During Exercise
entry.content: The Marine Corps Reserve is actively deploying multidomain collection assets during an integration course for the first time in its history, marking a technological milestone that ensures the service remains an agile force prepared to dominate in complex, data-driven conflicts.

entry.title: Leader of Antifa Cell Members in North Texas Sentenced to 100 Years in Prison for Terrorist Attack on ICE Facility
entry.content: Eight North Texas Antifa Cell operatives were sentenced for their roles in rioting, using weapons and explosives, providing material support to terrorists, obstruction, and the attempted murder of an Alvarado police officer at the Prairieland Detention Center on July 4, 2025.

entry.title: Hegseth: Defense and Fiscal Hawks, Unite!
entry.content: Urgency, speed, efficiency, competition and lethality are the new guiding principles of the War Department, Secretary of War Pete Hegseth writes. This moment requires defense hawks and fiscal hawks to pull together.

entry.title: Fleet Exercise 250 | Spanish and French Marines Backload
entry.content: Fleet Exercise 250 | Spanish and French Marines Backload

entry.title: Spellacy Functional Fitness Center Dedication Video
entry.content: Spellacy Functional Fitness Center Dedication Video

entry.title: Coast Guard aircrew conducts medevac on Lake Huron
entry.content: Coast Guard aircrew conducts medevac on Lake Huron

entry.title: Fort McCoy opens new microgrid to strengthen energy resilience at main gate
entry.content: Fort McCoy opens new microgrid to strengthen energy resilience at main gate

entry.title: 75th U.S. Army Reserve Innovation Command tech assessment teams evaluate C-sUAS during Operation Sentinel Justice 26
entry.content: 75th U.S. Army Reserve Innovation Command tech assessment teams evaluate C-sUAS during Operation Sentinel Justice 26

entry.title: Images - Page 13 - Tag change of command
entry.content: Images - Page 13 - Tag change of command

entry.title: Images - Page 16 - Tag change of command
entry.content: Images - Page 16 - Tag change of command

entry.title: Team Army Competitor Brings 'Never Give Up' Spirit to Warrior Games
entry.content: For Army Capt. Vanessa Munro, arriving at the 2026 Warrior Games already feels like a victory. Before the first event began, her presence with Team Army was a reminder of how far recovery can reach when determination, support and purpose come together.

entry.title: 75th U.S. Army Reserve Innovation Command tech assessment teams evaluate C-sUAS during Ope
entry.content: 75th U.S. Army Reserve Innovation Command tech assessment teams evaluate C-sUAS during Ope

entry.title: Secretary of War General Officer Announcements for June 22, 2026
entry.content: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth announced President Donald J. Trump made general officer nominations.

entry.title: NASCAR San Diego Weekend Connects Sailors, Community for Navy 250
entry.content: Naval Base Coronado welcomed more than 100,000 visitors, race fans, service members, military families and community partners during the inaugural NASCAR San Diego Weekend, which celebrated the service's enduring connection to the American people.

entry.title: Allies Come Together in the Indo-Pacific for Exercise Valiant Shield 26
entry.content: U.S. Pacific Command joint forces, along with allied and partner forces, kicked off Exercise Valiant Shield 2026 in the Indo-Pacific region to strengthen the joint and combined force through training in precise, lethal and overwhelming scenarios.

entry.title: Army Reserve senior enlisted council convenes at Fort Buchanan
entry.content: Army Reserve senior enlisted council convenes at Fort Buchanan

entry.title: Ceremony Brings New Name, Transformation to 7th Infantry Division
entry.content: The 7th Infantry Division (Multi-Domain Command-Pacific) is the Army's newest theater-enabling command, built to integrate maneuver, fires, air defense, cyber, space, electronic warfare, intelligence, unmanned systems, sustainment and command and control to support the joint force across the Pacific.

entry.title: Five Eyes Cyber Security Agencies Statement
entry.content: As the leaders of the Five Eyes cyber security agencies, we are united in our call to action: the evolving landscape of artificial intelligence (AI) is rapidly transforming cyber risk, and we must act swiftly to remain ahead.

entry.title: Medal of Honor Monday: Army Lt. Col. Robert G. Cole
entry.content: Army Lt. Col. Robert G. Cole was a 101st Airborne Division paratrooper who fought in the European Theater during World War II, where his valorous actions near Carentan, France, earned him the Medal of Honor.

entry.title: Lethal Kinetic Strike, June 21, 2026
entry.content: Lethal Kinetic Strike, June 21, 2026

entry.title: 7th ID Conducts Redesignation Ceremony
entry.content: 7th ID Conducts Redesignation Ceremony

entry.title: Multimedia - Page 5 - Tag Water Safety
entry.content: Multimedia - Page 5 - Tag Water Safety

entry.title: Army Reserve Soldiers revalidate combat medic skills in ad hoc course
entry.content: Army Reserve Soldiers revalidate combat medic skills in ad hoc course

entry.title: Images - Page 9 - Tag 2-mile run
entry.content: Images - Page 9 - Tag 2-mile run

entry.title: Images - Tag flying
entry.content: Images - Tag flying

entry.title: Images - Tag Army251
entry.content: Images - Tag Army251

entry.title: Images - Page 4 - Tag River Assault
entry.content: Images - Page 4 - Tag River Assault

entry.title: Trump, Hegseth Praise New Medal of Honor Recipients
entry.content: President Donald J. Trump and Secretary of War Pete Hegseth lauded the intrepid valor of three servicemen whom the commander in chief awarded the Medal of Honor to at a White House ceremony.

entry.title: Secretary of War to Serve as Honorary Starter at NASCAR 'Race the Base' in San Diego
entry.content: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth will travel to San Diego to be the honorary starter of NASCAR's "Race the Base" at Naval Base Coronado.

entry.title: Signers of the Declaration of Independence: New York
entry.content: Delegates to the Second Continental Congress adopted the Declaration of Independence on July 4, 1776. Four of the 56 delegates who signed the formal break from Britain — William Floyd, Francis Lewis, Philip Livingston and Lewis Morris — represented New York.

entry.title: Images - Page 3 - Tag hurricane Harvey
entry.content: Images - Page 3 - Tag hurricane Harvey

entry.title: Camp Lejeune Modernizes Tactical Driving With High-Tech Realism
entry.content: The multiplatform driver simulator allows Marines at Marine Corps Base Camp Lejeune, N.C., to push the limits of the joint light tactical vehicle without assuming any physical risk.

entry.title: War Department Review to Ensure 'NATO 3.0' Becomes Europe-Led Defense Alliance
entry.content: The War Department plans a review of its posture and footprint in Europe to determine how the U.S. is supporting NATO, how partners are supporting NATO and whether what's happening on the ground reflects what President Donald J. Trump and Secretary of War Pete Hegseth believe the alliance should be.

entry.title: Crush the Mountain, Ace the Test
entry.content: Airmen stationed in Stavanger, Norway, are improving their running abilities by regularly participating in timed runs on nearby mountain running trails.

entry.title: The Department of War's Office of Strategic Capital Signs $725 Million Conditional Loan Commitment With Energy Fuels, Inc.
entry.content: The Department of War's Office of Strategic Capital announced a $725 million conditional loan commitment with Energy Fuels Inc. to scale the company's domestic processing of rare earth elements.

entry.title: Readout of Secretary of War Pete Hegseth's Meeting With UK Defence Secretary Dan Jarvis
entry.content: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth met with U.K. Defense Secretary Dan Jarvis in Brussels.

entry.title: The LOGSTAT: Go for Green - Optimizing Nutrition
entry.content: The LOGSTAT: Go for Green - Optimizing Nutrition

entry.title: Draft Finding of No Significant Impact and Environmental Assessment — Wilson West Pier Rep
entry.content: Draft Finding of No Significant Impact and Environmental Assessment — Wilson West Pier Rep

entry.title: Soldier realizing ambitions in the U.S. Army Reserve
entry.content: Soldier realizing ambitions in the U.S. Army Reserve

entry.title: Florida Man Indicted for Attempted Mass Shooting Targeting Jewish Victims
entry.content: Forrest Kendall Pemberton, 27, of Gainesville, has been indicted for an attempted mass shooting targeting Jewish victims because of their race and religion.

entry.title: The Quill & Sword | The FAR & Beyond Episode 41: FY2026 NDAA Rundown
entry.content: The Quill & Sword | The FAR & Beyond Episode 41: FY2026 NDAA Rundown

entry.title: WBAMC Med Talks Podcast Episode 6 - FIT Kit
entry.content: WBAMC Med Talks Podcast Episode 6 - FIT Kit

entry.title: Radio Spot: Pottery Lessons
entry.content: Radio Spot: Pottery Lessons

entry.title: GSA Selling Former Somerville, NJ Depot, Delivering Taxpayer Value
entry.content: GSA Selling Former Somerville, NJ Depot, Delivering Taxpayer Value

entry.title: Army Reserve Soldiers strengthen accountability through Tactical Personnel System during Operation Sentinel Justice
entry.content: Army Reserve Soldiers strengthen accountability through Tactical Personnel System during Operation Sentinel Justice

entry.title: Army Reserve Soldier become first section to be gunnery qualified in 10 years
entry.content: Army Reserve Soldier become first section to be gunnery qualified in 10 years

entry.title: Inspired by family, driven to serve: Combat medic finds purpose in Army Reserve
entry.content: Inspired by family, driven to serve: Combat medic finds purpose in Army Reserve

entry.title: USATA expands calibration support for M41 PATS in Pacific Division
entry.content: USATA expands calibration support for M41 PATS in Pacific Division

entry.title: Texas National Guardsmen Earn Order of the Spur
entry.content: Texas Army National Guard cavalry soldiers earned their place in the Order of the Spur by completing a squadron Spur Ride, taking part in a tradition that goes back more than 200 years.

entry.title: Drone Dominance Program Receives First Order, Gauntlet II Gets Underway
entry.content: Drone Dominance Program Gauntlet Phase II qualifiers concluded last week, a critical test for a battlefield that is evolving at an unprecedented pace, as the War Department gears up to order 60,000 more high-performing drones in September.

entry.title: Army Reserve Soldiers Connect with community in East Harlem
entry.content: Army Reserve Soldiers Connect with community in East Harlem

entry.title: Army Reserve Soldiers strengthen accountability through Tactical Personnel System during O
entry.content: Army Reserve Soldiers strengthen accountability through Tactical Personnel System during O

entry.title: Iron Forge challenges Army Reserve public affairs Soldiers in AI-driven exercise
entry.content: Iron Forge challenges Army Reserve public affairs Soldiers in AI-driven exercise

entry.title: USV Swarm Demonstrates Maritime Security Capabilities During Exercise Salaknib 26
entry.content: Soldiers assigned to the 25th Infantry Division partnered with Philippine Army forces and industry representatives during Exercise Salaknib 2026 to demonstrate how autonomous maritime systems can enhance security and protect critical transportation operations in contested environments.

entry.title: Team Army Opens 2026 Warrior Games With Eight Powerlifting Medals
entry.content: Team Army earned eight medals in powerlifting on the first day of competition during the 2026 Warrior Games in San Antonio, while demonstrating that the greatest victories often extend far beyond the podium.

entry.title: San Diego Resident Charged with Conspiring to Provide Material Support to Hamas
entry.content: The Justice Department announced the unsealing of a five-count complaint charging Reda Mazen Rida Sabassi, 38, of San Diego, California, with terrorism, sanctions-evasion, wire fraud, money laundering, and false statement charges in connection with his efforts to divert funds raised through purported charitable campaigns to Hamas and for personal use.

entry.title: Army, Finacne Corps 251st birthday
entry.content: Army, Finacne Corps 251st birthday

entry.title: Dodge receives DMR
entry.content: Dodge receives DMR

entry.title: 416th Theater Engineer Command Soldiers become first section in Army Reserve to be gunnery qualified in 10 years
entry.content: 416th Theater Engineer Command Soldiers become first section in Army Reserve to be gunnery qualified in 10 years

entry.title: 416th Theater Engineer Command Soldiers become first section in Army Reserve to be gunnery
entry.content: 416th Theater Engineer Command Soldiers become first section in Army Reserve to be gunnery

entry.title: Images - Page 40 - Tag Noncommissioned Officer
entry.content: Images - Page 40 - Tag Noncommissioned Officer

entry.title: Funding the Fight: USAFMCOM Celebrates Army, Finance Corps Birthdays
entry.content: Funding the Fight: USAFMCOM Celebrates Army, Finance Corps Birthdays

entry.title: MUMS-14 activation ceremony
entry.content: MUMS-14 activation ceremony

entry.title: GSA and FDA Break Ground on $228M Cutting-Edge Lab at the Denver Federal Center
entry.content: GSA and FDA Break Ground on $228M Cutting-Edge Lab at the Denver Federal Center

entry.title: Sunscreen Vibes REEL
entry.content: Sunscreen Vibes REEL

entry.title: Project Patriot Pipeline Crafting Avenues of Service for Skilled Workers
entry.content: The War Department's Project Patriot Pipeline is an initiative designed to provide a flow of skilled workers to meet the department's needs, while simultaneously supporting the defense industrial base.

entry.title: 111th Attack Wing hosts TAG Safety Stand Down at Biddle Air National Guard Base
entry.content: 111th Attack Wing hosts TAG Safety Stand Down at Biddle Air National Guard Base

entry.title: Army Reserve sustainment Soldiers train for large-scale combat operations during Operation
entry.content: Army Reserve sustainment Soldiers train for large-scale combat operations during Operation

entry.title: Army Reserve sustainment Soldiers train for large-scale combat operations during Operation Sentinel Justice
entry.content: Army Reserve sustainment Soldiers train for large-scale combat operations during Operation Sentinel Justice

entry.title: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth Travels to Belgium
entry.content: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth will participate in the NATO Defense Ministerial in Brussels, Belgium, where he will focus on the urgent need for NATO allies to assume primary responsibility for the conventional defense of the European continent.

entry.title: ‘Rockstar’ Chief Warrant Officer Retires After Successful 25 Years of Service in the Illin
entry.content: ‘Rockstar’ Chief Warrant Officer Retires After Successful 25 Years of Service in the Illin

entry.title: Caribbean District prepares for 2026 Hurricane Season with multi‑day exercise
entry.content: Caribbean District prepares for 2026 Hurricane Season with multi‑day exercise

entry.title: Celebrating Engineering Excellence: How USACE Strengthens Army Reserve Installation Manage
entry.content: Celebrating Engineering Excellence: How USACE Strengthens Army Reserve Installation Manage

entry.title: U.S. 2nd Fleet, International Partners Commence Fleet Exercise 250
entry.content: Ships from 17 allied and partner nations arrived at Naval Station Norfolk, Va., to prepare for Fleet Exercise 250, a multinational maritime training event designed to enhance interoperability and test the integrated forces in a dynamic environment.

entry.title: Marine Corps Opens 2026 Warrior Games With Strong Showing
entry.content: Team Marine Corps opened the 2026 Warrior Games with a strong showing in powerlifting and an exhibition pickleball competition, earning 10 medals and setting the tone for the week ahead.

entry.title: Five Men Arrested and Charged in Plot to Attack and Kill Government Officials and Others Attending the Ultimate Fighting Championship at White House
entry.content: The Justice Department announced charges against five men for an alleged plot to carry out an attack to kill government officials and others attending the Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) Freedom 250 event held at the White House.

entry.title: Office of Strategic Capital Signs $500 Million Conditional Loan Commitment With Phoenix Tailings
entry.content: The War Department's Office of Strategic Capital announced a $500 million conditional loan commitment with Phoenix Tailings to scale the company's domestic processing of rare earth elements.

entry.title: Readout of Secretary of War Pete Hegseth's Meeting With Italian Defense Minister His Excellency Guido Crosetto
entry.content: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth met with Italian Defense Minister Guido Crosetto at the Pentagon.

entry.title: Highnoon Radio News Segment
entry.content: Highnoon Radio News Segment

entry.title: Radio News Spot: Aircraft and Drone Operations Project Expansion
entry.content: Radio News Spot: Aircraft and Drone Operations Project Expansion

entry.title: Moving with TRICARE: A game plan for success
entry.content: Moving with TRICARE: A game plan for success

entry.title: Multimedia - Tag hard hats
entry.content: Multimedia - Tag hard hats

entry.title: Readout of Secretary of War Pete Hegseth's Bilateral Meeting With Ecuador's President Daniel Noboa
entry.content: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth had a bilateral meeting at the Pentagon with Ecuador's President Daniel Noboa to discuss U.S. national security interests and the two countries' defense cooperation.

entry.title: Hegseth Welcomes Ecuadorian President to War Department
entry.content: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth welcomed Ecuadorian President Daniel Noboa to the Pentagon to discuss the bonds of defense-based cooperation between their respective countries.

entry.title: U.S. Department of Commerce allocates $123.6M in fishery disaster funding to Alaska, Oregon, California and Squaxin Island Tribe
entry.content: U.S. Department of Commerce allocates $123.6M in fishery disaster funding to Alaska, Oregon, California and Squaxin Island Tribe June 17, 2026 The Status of Stocks report provides an annual update on the status of U.S. marine fisheries. Working waterfronts such as this one in Sitka, Alaska are home to commercial fishing vessels. (Image credit: NOAA) Download Image Today, NOAA announced the allocation of $123.6 million in fishery resource disaster funding, appropriated by Congress in the American

entry.title: Warrior Games Week Marks New Chapter for Army Veteran
entry.content: Warrior Games week represents more than competition for the Calantoc family. It marks another step forward in their recovery journey.

entry.title: Army Marksmanship Unit Marks 70 Years of Precision, Innovation, Service
entry.content: The U.S. Army Marksmanship Unit, officially established Feb. 16, 1956, has had an enduring impact on Army readiness, research, doctrine and lethality. As the unit enters its eighth decade, its mission is more vital than ever.

entry.title: Hegseth, Italian Counterpart Meet at Pentagon
entry.content: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth hosted Italian Defense Minister Guido Crosetto during a bilateral engagement at the Pentagon.

entry.title: Sea turtles
entry.content: Sea turtles Loggerhead Turtle escaping a net equipped with turtle exclusion device (TED) (Image credit: NOAA) Download Image June 15, 2026 Sea turtles breathe air, like all reptiles, and have streamlined bodies with large flippers. They are well adapted to life in the ocean and inhabit tropical and subtropical ocean waters around the world. Of the seven species of sea turtles, six are found in U.S. waters; these include the green, hawksbill, Kemp's ridley, leatherback, loggerhead, and olive ridl

entry.title: El Niño's Affects on West Coast Marine Species
entry.content: El Niño's Affects on West Coast Marine Species (Image credit: California Department of Fish and Wildlife.) Download Image June 15, 2026 Fisheries climate fisheries marine life 0 Off

entry.title: Mexican Citizen Sentenced for Role in Prolific Human Smuggling Organization That Moved Aliens From Central Asia, Africa, and the Middle East
entry.content: A Mexican national extradited from Mexico was sentenced to 87 months prison for his role in a smuggling organization.

entry.title: Medal of Honor Monday: Army Pvt. Joe Gandara
entry.content: Army Pvt. Joe Gandara posthumously received the Medal of Honor for sacrificing his life to destroy three enemy machine guns and save his pinned-down World War II unit.

entry.title: ITX 3-26 | CLB-23 conducts Motorized Operations Course
entry.content: ITX 3-26 | CLB-23 conducts Motorized Operations Course

entry.title: Harold Bray: The Last Survivor from the USS Indianapolis (CA 35)
entry.content: Harold Bray: The Last Survivor from the USS Indianapolis (CA 35)

entry.title: 1-40th Cavalry Regiment Prepares for Final Transformation During Exercise Red Flag
entry.content: Soldiers assigned to the 2nd Infantry Brigade Combat Team, 11th Airborne Division, at Joint Base Elmendorf-Richardson, Alaska, demonstrated the Army's commitment to transformation, readiness and joint lethality during Exercise Red Flag-Alaska 26-2.

entry.title: Women
entry.content: Women

entry.title: Naval Research Laboratory Receives Space Force Antenna, Expanding Joint Space Capabilities
entry.content: The U.S. Naval Research Laboratory received a transportable satellite tracking antenna system from Space Systems Command's System Delta 81 to expand joint space testing, training and operational support capabilities at the laboratory's Blossom Point Tracking Facility in Welcome, Md.

entry.title: Michigan Army National Guard Uses UAS to Train for Tomorrow's Battlefield
entry.content: Nine soldiers assigned to the 3rd Battalion, 126th Infantry Regiment, participated in a two-week unmanned aerial system program, as the Michigan National Guard expands its drone training initiative.

entry.title: Master of Shadow Fleet Tanker Pleads Guilty in D.C. for Evading U.S. Coast Guard During Weeks-Long Pursuit
entry.content: Avtandil Kalandadze, the former ship master of a shadow fleet tanker that historically transported Iran- and Venezuela-origin oil for the ultimate benefit of U.S. adversaries, pleaded guilty in U.S. District Court for refusing to obey orders from the U.S. Coast Guard during a multi-week pursuit from the Caribbean Sea through to the North Atlantic Ocean.

entry.title: “A Case for Military Proportionality: Disabling Nuclear Plants”
entry.content: “A Case for Military Proportionality: Disabling Nuclear Plants”

entry.title: Department of War Publishes Third Release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files on WAR.GOV/UFO
entry.content: DOW published the third release of declassified and historical Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena files as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters (PURSUE).

entry.title: Signers of the Declaration of Independence: Rhode Island
entry.content: Delegates to the Second Continental Congress adopted the Declaration of Independence on July 4, 1776. Stephen Hopkins and William Ellery, two of the 56 delegates who signed the formal break from Britain, represented Rhode Island.

entry.title: USACE Louisville District breaks ground on $11.6M substation to secure Rock Island Arsenal manufacturing
entry.content: USACE Louisville District breaks ground on $11.6M substation to secure Rock Island Arsenal manufacturing

entry.title: Increasing Interoperability in Medical Care During Marara 26
entry.content: Increasing Interoperability in Medical Care During Marara 26

entry.title: Joint Press Statement on the Sixth Nuclear Consultative Group Meeting
entry.content: The United States and South Korea held the sixth U.S.-ROK Nuclear Consultative Group meeting in Seoul.

entry.title: Historic Artillery Live Fire Marks New Era at Richardson Training Area
entry.content: Historic Artillery Live Fire Marks New Era at Richardson Training Area

entry.content: News - Tag Operation Sentinel Justice

entry.title: Nimitz Conducts Air Power Demonstration Over Gulf of America

entry.title: NMFDC Corpsmen celebrate the 128th Hospital Corpsman Birthday - HM2 Anastasia Sanchez
entry.content: NMFDC Corpsmen celebrate the 128th Hospital Corpsman Birthday - HM2 Anastasia Sanchez

entry.title: Carrying the Torch: 815th Airlift Squadron Assumes Airlift Mission in Africa
entry.content: Airmen assigned to the Minnesota Air National Guard 133rd Airlift Wing concluded a historic deployment to Africa, as airmen assigned to the Air Force Reserve 815th Airlift Squadron, known as the Flying Jennies, are carrying the torch for the next rotation.

entry.title: Army Reserve civil affairs Soldiers leverage AI to sharpen skills in simulated environments
entry.content: Army Reserve civil affairs Soldiers leverage AI to sharpen skills in simulated environments

entry.title: Record Number of Army Reservists Enlist as the Army Meets Its Annual Recruiting Goal
entry.content: Record Number of Army Reservists Enlist as the Army Meets Its Annual Recruiting Goal

entry.title: Understanding the life-saving power of your hard hat
entry.content: Understanding the life-saving power of your hard hat

entry.title: Task Force Civil Affairs Team Conducts Subject Matter Expert Exchange in Libya
entry.content: U.S. Army civil affairs soldiers conducted a military-to-military subject matter expert exchange with representatives of the Libyan National Army and the Government of National Unity in Benghazi, Libya.

entry.title: Fort McCoy hosts 2026 E3B event, testing Soldiers for Army’s prestigious expert skill badges

entry.title: Joint Statement on the U.S.-Japan CBRN Defense Policy Dialogue
entry.content: Tomoki Matsuo, Deputy Director General, Defense Policy Bureau, Japan Ministry of Defense, and Dr. Robert Soofer, U.S. Deputy Assistant Secretary of War for Nuclear Deterrence and Countering Weapons of Mass Destruction Policy, held a Chemical, Biological, Radiological, and Nuclear Defense Policy Dialogue in Tokyo.

entry.title: Executive Proclamation restores commercial fishing in Pacific marine monuments, unlocks economic opportunity
entry.content: Executive Proclamation restores commercial fishing in Pacific marine monuments, unlocks economic opportunity June 11, 2026 The IATTC adopted new three-year management measures for tropical tunas including yellowfin caught by purse seine and longline vessels in the eastern Pacific Ocean. (Image credit: Shutterstock/Al McGlashan) On June 11, 2026, President Trump signed an "Executive Proclamation Restoring American Commercial Fishing in the Pacific," opening additional prized fishing grounds to ha

entry.content: First Contact

entry.title: U.S. Plans Major Strikes on Iran, Hegseth Says
entry.content: After a busy morning visiting troops in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, Secretary of War Pete Hegseth traveled back to the U.S. to MacDill Air Force Base, Fla., for a meeting with U.S. Central Command leadership, where discussion centered on, among other things, operations planned for Iran.

entry.title: 9th Mission Support Command Wraps Up Relief Mission in Saipan After Super Typhoon Sinlaku
entry.content: 9th Mission Support Command Wraps Up Relief Mission in Saipan After Super Typhoon Sinlaku

entry.title: U.S. Prepared for Anything, Hegseth Tells Troops at Guantanamo Bay
entry.content: At Naval Station Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, Secretary of War Pete Hegseth met with service members for a morning physical training session and also discussed readiness with mission leaders at the installation.

entry.title: V Corps’ Best Squad Competition day three
entry.content: V Corps’ Best Squad Competition day three

entry.title: Statement from FBI Director Patel on Most Wanted Fraudster Arrest
entry.content: FBI Director Kash Patel issued a statement about the surrender of Said Abdullahi Ereg following his addition to the FBI’s newly established Most Wanted Fraudsters list.

entry.title: Department of War Establishes Cyber Mastery Incentive Pay
entry.content: The Department of War is launching the Cyber Mastery Incentive Pay program, a key effort in the Secretary of War's Project Patriot Pipeline initiative.

entry.title: 33rd Maintenance Squadron Refurbishes Khobar Towers Memorial Sword
entry.content: Airmen assigned to the 33rd Maintenance Squadron revitalized the flaming sword centered on the 33rd Fighter Wing's Khobar Towers Memorial by modifying it to keep the flame burning without environmental disruption.

entry.title: Army Astronaut Selected for NASA's Historic Artemis III Mission
entry.content: Army Col. Frank Rubio, assigned to the U.S. Army Space and Missile Defense Command, will serve as a mission specialist on an upcoming NASA Artemis III mission.

entry.title: USACE river infrastructure paves the way for ODOT’s Brent Spence Bridge project

entry.title: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth Travels to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba and Tampa, Florida
entry.content: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth will be traveling to Cuba and Florida to engage with troops at Guantanamo Bay and U.S. Central Command in Tampa.

entry.title: Seabees Connect to Past During Exercise Baltic Operations 26
entry.content: Navy construction personnel taking part in Exercise Baltic Operations 26 in Latvia built a camp named in honor of a Navy aircraft lost over the Baltic Sea during the Cold War in 1950.
